about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Hello! My name is Nikolay and I am a fullstack developer.
about.timeline.ya.content:
- Developed new features on the client side (React) and server side (Express)
- Used internal UI libraries
- Found and fixed bugs
- Performed migrations
- Optimized and refactored code
